name: python3-typeshed
title: python3-typeshed
summary: collection of library stubs for Python, with static types
description:
collection of library stubs for Python, with static types
Typeshed contains external type annotations for the Python standard library
and Python builtins, as well as third party packages as contributed by people
external to those projects.
.
This data can e.g. be used for static analysis, type checking or type
inference.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-typeshed because collection of library stubs for Python, with static types.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-typeshed as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-typeshed with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-typeshed --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
